Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Additional Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Oct-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

David A. Berkley; Womble Bond Dickinson (US) LLP; 657-266-1065; appearing via CourtCall on behalf of plaintiff Futurewei Technologies, Inc.

No other appearances. Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FUTUREWEI TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'S NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF ADDITIONAL WRIT OF ATTACHMENT is GRANTED in the total amount of $392,004.50, including $14,850 in attorney's fees.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Continued To Nov-24-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF FUTUREWEI TECHNOLOGIES, INC., A TEXAS CORPORATION'S NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is GRANTED in the amount of $92,973.06. Plaintiff exercised its right to terminate the sublease, but provides no evidence of its attempts to mitigate damages thereafter and no discussion of legal authority on this issue is provided. Plaintiff appears to seek to attach rent that has not yet become due under the Lease, September to December 2021. Plaintiff appears to seek brokerage fee that was due at the inception of the lease (the Court assumes that Plaintiff relies on paragraph 22 of the Sublease as no specific paragraph is mentioned in the operative complaint), but no evidence is provided that such payment has not been made. Plaintiff further appears to seek to attach estimated attorney's fees. This request is not supported by evidence. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:(Zoom)
Nikku Kalifian, 949.442.7110 for Plaintiff Futurewei Technologies, Inc.
No other appearance.

Discussed. The Plainitff does not contest the tentative ruling.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER; ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT is DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to provide admissible evidence to support its requested attachment of $419,996. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF FUTUREWEI TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Application For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is transferred to be heard on June 30, 2021 in Department 501, which handles all breach of lease and other real property actions. (See SF Local Rule 8.10.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
